mapper.sql: id, user_id, username, phone, email, password, salt, status, role_code, tenant_id, create_time, update_time, create_by, update_by
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM auth_user WHERE username = #{username} OR email = #{username} LIMIT 1

SELECT
FROM auth_user WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM auth_user WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId}
